headline: Moderna Launches Moderna Direct with “eCommerce Powered by FFF Enterprises™”
summary: eCommerce Powered by FFF Enterprises™ delivers an enhanced ordering experience for Moderna customers.TEMECULA, Calif., June 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- FFF Enterprises, Inc. — the nation’s most trusted specialty pharmaceutical distributor and diversified healthcare company — today announced that Moderna has selected FFF’s ecommerce platform to power Moderna Direct. eCommerce Powered by FFF Enterprises™ delivers an enhanced ordering experience for Moderna customers. headline: Moderna CEPI Ebola Vaccine Work Highlights Broader Infectious Disease Ambitions
summary: Moderna (NasdaqGS:MRNA) has expanded its collaboration with CEPI to accelerate development of an mRNA vaccine targeting Bundibugyo ebolavirus. The partnership focuses on responding to an ongoing Ebola outbreak in Central Africa, where no approved vaccines currently exist for this strain. CEPI funding is intended to support rapid research and early stage development using Moderna's mRNA platform for epidemic preparedness. For readers tracking Moderna beyond its Covid-19 work, this move fits...

headline: MRNA Partners With CEPI to Develop Vaccine for Bundibugyo Ebolavirus
summary: Moderna gains up to $50M from CEPI to advance a Bundibugyo ebolavirus vaccine as the partnership expands amid an ongoing Ebola outbreak.

headline: Pfizer CEO Albert Bourla on the company's oncology focus
summary: Pfizer CEO Albert Bourla joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the company's recent announcement about the lung cancer drug that has shown promising results on slowing the progression of the disease.
